stemHtml: Which statement about GPS navigation is true?

options.a: The Dilution of Precision (DOP) has to be more than level 6 for position fixing in en-route navigation.
options.b: The satellite clock error correction is important for accurate position fixing.
options.c: The tropospheric delay is negligible when navigating in P-RNAV condition.
options.d: The combination of GPS and INS has no advantages.
